StatsCard.style: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

FilterBar.style: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 mb-6 items-end md:items-center bg-white p-4 rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-100

instructions_to_main_agent: Add route '/message-status' to App.js protected routes.
Use existing Shadcn UI components from /components/ui where possible (Table, Select, Card, Button).
If Shadcn components are missing, build custom using Tailwind based on existing designs.
Mock data for now, but structure it to be easily replaced by API calls.
Ensure 'Mobile First' responsiveness. Stack stats cards on mobile.
Use the specified 'Georgia' font for the Page Title ('Message Status Dashboard').
Use 'Inter' for all table data and stats numbers.
Implement the Status Badge as a pill with the specified color codes (bg + text + border).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
